category_sources: Official dbmx.net Tkrzw pages describe DBM/key-value database APIs.
source_facts.description says Tkrzw is a set of implementations of DBM.
display_name_sources: Official dbmx.net project page styles the project as Tkrzw.
docs_sources: Official dbmx.net API directories provide C++, Ruby, and Java documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Tkrzw homepage.
repo_sources: Database of Databases points to https://github.com/estraier/tkrzw as Tkrzw source code; source_facts.homepage confirms dbmx.net as the upstream project site.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
tags_sources: Official dbmx.net API docs describe database-manager and key-value APIs.
